text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Hmph, it's almost time to head back. Let's go,
Flower!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Flower?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Oh, sorry! I'm comi—

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Owww...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
You've been wincing and groaning all day. Did
you hurt yourself somewhere?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Oh, um, it's nothing that serious! My joints just
feel a little creaky, is all.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
That's not "nothing," Flower. Shouldn't you get
that looked at?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Or at least talk to your trainer about it.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Well...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
The thing is, we're both doing our best and
staying positive right now.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Trainer and I are both confident I'll run well in the
Takamatsunomiya Kinen...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
And... I don't want to burst our bubble, you
know?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I'll bring it up if my joints really start hurting, of
course! But right now, I'm fine.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... When something hurts, you should just say
so.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
But here, I'll do you a special favor and cast a
spell on you—one that'll have you feeling better
in no time!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Sweet Pea... Thank you! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On a busy day of training in the lead-up to the
Takamatsunomiya Kinen...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: ...Huh?
choice_data_list: Is something wrong?
Is something wrong?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: N-no... Let's keep going!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We carry on with the training session, but
something about Nishino Flower's movements
seem stiff.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Phew... That was tough.
choice_data_list: Are you feeling okay?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Um... What do you mean?
choice_data_list: Does your body feel off in any way?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Not at all! I feel perfectly fine!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: I'm just, uh... a little bit tired...
choice_data_list: Then let's take the rest of the day off.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: What?! N-no, I'm fine! I can keep training.
choice_data_list: No overdoing it!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: I'm sorry...
choice_data_list: You don't have to apologize.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: No, I...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: ...Sorry. I'm gonna go get changed!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Something's definitely up with Nishino Flower,
but if she doesn't want to tell me, pressuring her
about it might only have the opposite effect.
choice_data_list: (But maybe...)

text_block_list.name: Infirmary Doctor
text_block_list.text: Trainer, her body is already in a state of flux.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This may not be a bad thing. I'll just have to keep
a closer eye than usual on her.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Sigh...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: I... told a lie.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
(I'm sorry, Trainer. But I'm really okay. I just don't
want you to worry...)

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: (I am okay, right? I hope this doesn't get any worse...)

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
...Is my body breaking down because I lied to
Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: No, no, I'm fine!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: I'm fine...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: ...Phew.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nishino Flower still looks upset even during our
next training session.
choice_data_list: Maybe your body hasn't gotten enough rest yet.
Maybe your body hasn't gotten enough rest yet.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: No, I'm fine!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Oh, s-sorry... I, uh...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: I'm going to go run now!
choice_data_list: Flower!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant, pant... Huh?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: (I knew it. Something really is wrong... My legs won't move like I want them to!)

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
(No, I'm just imagining things! There's no way my
body can change that fast. It can't just suddenly
give up on me or anything...)

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
(I'm fine... I'm fine! As long as I concentrate as I
run, everything will be fine!)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nishino Flower's start is a little awkward. She
gradually slows down before finally coming to a
stop.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: ...Why?
choice_data_list: Flower...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: I'm sorry!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: I lied! I'm not okay at all...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
My legs won't move properly... They don't feel
the same as they did before...
choice_data_list: Calm down for a second, Flower.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Waaah! I'm doomed!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: I'm... so sorry!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: I can't... run anymore!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Waaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nishino Flower starts bawling her eyes out. It
breaks my already anxious heart. But...
choice_data_list: Don't worry. Everything's going to be okay.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After hearing what she said, I'm convinced. Right
now, she's standing at the crossroads of change.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Sob... Sniffle... Hic!
choice_data_list: Let's go to the infirmary together.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Sniffle... Okay...

text_block_list.name: Infirmary Doctor
text_block_list.text: Mm-hmm. You're going through a growth spurt.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: A growth spurt?

text_block_list.name: Infirmary Doctor
text_block_list.text:
Yes. Even though you're race-ready, you're still
younger than the other students because you
skipped grades, so your body was less mature.

text_block_list.name: Infirmary Doctor
text_block_list.text:
But now, your physique is finally catching up to
the others.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I'll be just like them? Does that mean my joint
pain is...

text_block_list.name: Infirmary Doctor
text_block_list.text:
Simply regular growing pains. My examination
didn't reveal anything you should worry about.

text_block_list.name: Infirmary Doctor
text_block_list.text: It's proof that your body is changing and growing.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: I'm... growing?

text_block_list.name: Infirmary Doctor
text_block_list.text:
That's right! You are! Congratulations, Nishino
Flower!
choice_data_list: Congrats, Flower!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Oh, I'm so glad! What a relief!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I... I thought my body was breaking down because
I lied to you, Trainer!
choice_data_list:
You only did that because you didn't want to
worry me.

You only did that because you didn't want to
worry me.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Yes, but still...
choice_data_list: Don't worry.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Huh?
choice_data_list: I won't ever let that happen to you.
I won't ever let that happen to you.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Trainer! Thank you!

text_block_list.name: Infirmary Doctor
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. It seems your trainer has grown a lot over
these past two years as well.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Sniffle...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: That's right! My trainer's the best!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And so, Nishino Flower's growth spurt begins!
